title: Anmeldung auf dem Server secureimap.t-online.de mit Benutzernamen "[edited]@t-online.de" fehlgeschlagen
creator: g-s.oberle
content:
Hallo zusammen, ich habe Mozila Thunderbird im Einsatz. Mein e-Mail-Konto lautet: [edited]@t-online.de.

Seit Ende Januar 2026 kann ich keine e-Mails mehr empfangen. Klicke ich auf den Button "Nachrichten empfangen", erscheint folgende Meldung: Anmeldung auf dem Server secureimap.t-online.de mit Benutzernamen "[edited]@t-online.de" fehlgeschlagen. Über mein Handy kann ich die eingegangen E-Mail ansehen. Warum auf meinem Laptop nicht?

Bisher habe ich noch nie ein Passwort eingegeben. Was muss ich machen?

Im Voraus vielen Dank.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen

Sandra Oberle

title: Thunderbird Don't show Link Wrapped Logo in Some Emails.
creator: sidra.hayat960
content:
Hello.

I just installed thunderbird for the first time and i really liked it but there is a problem some of my emails particularly from from Fiverr don't show Fiverr logo at the top within the email maybe that logo has linked wrapped in it on which i can click and it take me directly to my fiverr profile. These are official emails from fiverr. What i have tried: I tried every possible solution that i can get on internet. Show Remote content turning on and off, Turing Simplified view on and off. Turning of the Proxy from auto detect and Turning the DNS off. Fiddling around view settings. Changing settings in Configuration like mailnews.message_display.disable_remote_image, browser.opaqueResponseBlocking.javascriptValidator, browser.opaqueResponseBlocking, etc. But it didn't load the logo image and keep showing broken image place holder. This is also the case with my bank mail, my bank email sometime have an image with warning about OTPs not just text it also don't load. I also tried disabling the spam protection and i only use minimize to tray extension which i disabled to check if image loads or not ans tried to run it in Troubleshoot mode but no luck. I will really appreciate If anyone could help me and fixed the issue . :)

Thanks.

title: Double calendar alerts can't get discarded
creator: jmsanders
content:
Hi, I am getting double calendar alerts. Besides that, the alerts don't disapear when I click the discard button. The only thing that works is closing the alert window but after some time the same alert for the same event goes off again.

Perhaps the double alerts are somehow connected with two accounts? I reinstalled Thunderbird and had the account set before the reinstallation.

This seems to go inhand with double sending emails. When I send an email the receiver gets twice the same email. Also in the sent folder of email service provider are two copies of the email.

So this seems to be two problems: 1. double account sending emails and running alerts. 2. bug with the calendar alert window, that doesn't do anything when you click "discard" or "nooze off".
